_meta.purpose: Facility-level lat/lng for the travismorrow.com facility map feature (TractIQ overlays)
_meta.source_notes: Addresses sourced from Dropbox: Desktop 11.10.25/Hummingbird Facility List.xlsx, NSS W9 Signed/NSS Facility Name- Address - EIN .xlsx, A-Family Invoices/TEP A-Family Accounts 2024.xlsx, A-Family Invoices folder names, Desktop 11.10.25/Storage Facilities Report.xlsx. Geocoded via TractIQ geocode_search_tool (HERE Geocoding API) and cross-validated via TractIQ's own facility_search_tool (self-storage facility index) where available. TractIQ budget: 25 calls/day cap per Travis.
_meta.day_2_calls_detail: 6 geocode_search calls (301 re-geocode, 323 re-geocode, 338/339/341/343), 2 retry geocode_search calls for 301 (alternate phrasings, still failed), 1 geocode_search for 85756 zip centroid, 1 facility_search_tool call (radius search that resolved 301 via TractIQ's own facility index and cross-validated 323/326/333/338/341 against their TractIQ facility records).
_meta.verification_pass: 2026-07-10: cross-checked flagged entries against the public brand store-locator sites (nationalselfstorage.com, afamilystorage.com, storelocal.com) instead of internal paperwork/TractIQ — free and more authoritative. Resolved SIL1, ELP5/7/8/9, facility 301, 319, 323. Also spot-checked all remaining AFAM facilities (304-333, plus day-2 pending 338/339/341/343) and all NSS facilities (DEM1, DOV1, GRN1, ELP6, RNO1) against the sites — every address matched exactly (formatting/punctuation differences only), see per-entry notes.
_meta.day_2_geocode_pass: 2026-07-11: pulled the remaining 6 TractIQ calls (2 re-geocodes + 4 day-2 AFAM addresses). 301 could not be resolved via HERE's street geocoder at all (three attempts, all snapped to the wrong street 'N Casa Grande Hwy' or 'E Benson Hwy' — HERE's index apparently doesn't recognize 'I-10 Frontage Rd' as a named street in that segment). Resolved instead via TractIQ's own facility_search_tool, which has 'A Family Storage' at 7185 I-10 Frontage Rd, Tucson AZ 85756 directly in its self-storage facility index (facility_id 046574, owner_name 'Belen Hughes' — matches the owner on our other Belen Hughes AFAM stores). All other day-2 pulls (323, 338, 339, 341, 343) resolved cleanly via HERE geocode_search at queryScore 0.99-1.0, and where facility_search_tool's radius results happened to include them too (323, 338, 341), the coordinates matched to within ~0.0001 degrees — good cross-validation.
